retry_reason: Not applicable — function is a cleanup helper, not a get that can fail. If an entry is invalid (req->urb is NULL), it breaks early; there is no transient failure to retry.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to free all USB request structures in a queue; the call to usb_free_urb (a put operation) is the means to release each URB, but the function also performs list iteration and removal, and has error checking. It is a batch cleanup helper, not a focused reference-count wrapper.
